videos.headline: Roderick Daniels Jr. scores on electric punt-return TD for SMU
videos.description: SMU's Roderick Daniels Jr. fields the punt and returns it 69 yards to the house for a touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Roderick Daniels Jr. scores on electric punt-return TD for SMU) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: TCU coach ejected after two unsportsmanlike penalties to start 2nd half
videos.description: TCU coach Sonny Dykes is irate after a penalty that took away a kick return TD and promptly receives two unsportsmanlike penalties and an ejection.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (TCU coach ejected after two unsportsmanlike penalties to start 2nd half) 2024/09/21 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kevin Jennings finds Brashard Smith for SMU TD
videos.description: Kevin Jennings finds Brashard Smith for SMU TD
